strings.solar.installationIndia.title: Solar Installation Services Across India
strings.solar.installationIndia.description: {{company}} delivers turnkey rooftop solar installation for homeowners and businesses looking for long-term electricity savings. If you are searching for solar installation near me, rooftop solar installation India, or a reliable solar EPC company in India, our team handles execution from survey to commissioning.
strings.solar.installationIndia.whyChooseTitle: Why Clients Choose Our Solar Team
strings.solar.installationIndia.whyChooseDescrip: We combine technical planning, compliance-ready documentation, and execution discipline so your project runs smoothly. Our process is structured for high-intent buyers who want a dependable solar installation company in India, not trial-and-error vendors.
strings.solar.installationIndia.serviceArea.inst: Solar for schools, hospitals, and offices
strings.solar.installationIndia.process.survey: Site survey and electricity consumption analysis
strings.solar.price.title: Solar Panel Cost and Rooftop Solar Price in India
strings.solar.price.description: Looking for realistic solar system price for home in India? Final pricing depends on system size, roof condition, component quality, and subsidy eligibility. We help you select the right configuration so your investment is technically correct and financially practical.
strings.solar.price.popularSizesTitle: Popular System Sizes and Typical Use Cases
strings.solar.price.band.1kw: Small apartment backup and essential loads
strings.solar.price.band.2kw: Small family home with moderate daytime use
strings.solar.price.band.3kw: 2BHK to 3BHK home with regular daytime consumption
strings.solar.price.band.5kw: Larger homes and small commercial establishments
strings.solar.price.costImpactTitle: What Impacts Solar Installation Cost Per kW
strings.solar.price.costImpact.systemType: On-grid, off-grid, or hybrid system selection
strings.solar.price.costImpact.quality: Panel brand, inverter quality, and balance-of-system components
strings.solar.price.costImpact.roof: Roof access complexity and structure type
strings.solar.price.costImpact.battery: Battery storage requirement and backup design
strings.solar.price.quoteTitle: How to Get an Accurate Quote
strings.solar.price.quoteDescription: Share your electricity bill, roof details, and location. {{company}} provides a tailored proposal with system sizing, expected savings, and project execution scope.
strings.solar.subsidy.title: Rooftop Solar Subsidy Guide for India (2026)
strings.solar.subsidy.description: If you are searching for solar subsidy India 2026, PM solar yojana details, or MNRE solar subsidy India, this page gives a practical framework before you apply.
strings.solar.subsidy.step.eligibility: Check current eligibility criteria for your property and connection type
strings.solar.subsidy.step.documents: Prepare identity, ownership, and electricity bill records
strings.solar.subsidy.step.install: Install system and complete technical verification
strings.solar.subsidy.step.track: Track subsidy disbursement as per prevailing process
strings.solar.subsidy.note.guidelines: Guidelines can change over time by authority and financial year
strings.solar.subsidy.note.value: Final subsidy value depends on system size and category
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.1.q: Who can apply for rooftop solar subsidy in India?
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.1.a: Eligibility depends on current government guidelines, property type, and approved installation channels.
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.2.q: How do I apply for solar subsidy in India?
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.2.a: The process usually includes registration, document submission, installation through approved channels, and verification.
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.3.q: Does subsidy reduce total solar installation cost?
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.3.a: Yes, subsidy can reduce the effective upfront amount, but exact savings vary by system size and eligibility.
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.4.q: Can commercial users claim rooftop solar subsidy?
strings.solar.subsidy.faq.4.a: Subsidy rules vary by category. Residential schemes are usually separate from large commercial policy frameworks.
strings.solar.city.title: Solar Installation in {{city}}
strings.solar.city.description: Need a rooftop solar installer in {{city}}? We support residential and commercial clients with site-specific planning, system sizing, and execution workflows designed for long-term reliability.
strings.solar.city.startDescription: Share your electricity bill and property details. Our team reviews your use-case and suggests practical capacity, expected savings range, and implementation path.
strings.sector.inactive.title: {{sector}} is launching soon
strings.sector.inactive.description: This sector is in strategic planning and execution setup.
strings.sector.solar.hero.description: A structured customer journey from application to feasibility and execution. Every site request can be submitted digitally with address, GPS coordinates, and technical requirements.
strings.sector.solar.flow.title: Customer fills details once. System stores actionable installation context.
strings.sector.solar.process.intake: Customer submits identity, site address, and installation intent from the portal.
strings.sector.solar.process.geo: Latitude/longitude supports quicker map-level feasibility checks and route planning.
strings.sector.solar.process.qualification: Bill range, load, and roof profile help estimate practical system sizing.
strings.sector.solar.process.planning: Approved records are aligned to survey, installation, and commissioning operations.
strings.sector.solar.pipelineDescription: The digital form feeds a structured operational pipeline for faster qualification and planning.
strings.sector.solar.applicationDescription: This captures the first-phase information. Admin-side response and workflow actions can be connected next.
strings.sector.common.title: Solar Installation Services
strings.sector.common.description: Complete solar solutions for residential and commercial clients across Assam.
strings.sector.common.overviewText: We provide end-to-end solar project services including site audit, design, installation, commissioning, and support.
strings.sector.common.residentialText: Rooftop solar systems optimized for home energy savings and long-term reliability.
strings.sector.common.commercialText: High-capacity systems for offices, campuses, warehouses, and industrial facilities.

strings.terms.title: Terms of Service
strings.terms.subtitle: Guidelines for using our services and website
strings.terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern the use of services offered by {{company}} and the use of our official website and communication channels. By accessing our website, submitting project details, or requesting service support, you acknowledge and accept the obligations described in this document.
strings.terms.scope.title: Service Scope
strings.terms.scope.body: We provide solar installation and related operational support, including initial consultation, documentation review, site assessment, engineering planning, execution support, and post-installation coordination. Service availability and scope may vary depending on location, technical feasibility, regulatory permissions, and project-specific requirements.
strings.terms.accuracy.title: Information Accuracy
strings.terms.accuracy.body: Clients are responsible for ensuring that all submitted information, documents, and declarations are complete, accurate, and current. Any incorrect or incomplete information may delay evaluation, documentation, approvals, execution scheduling, or final project delivery.
strings.terms.use.title: Acceptable Website Use
strings.terms.use.body: The website may be used only for lawful and service-related purposes, including inquiries, document submission, and project communication. Any attempt to misuse the platform, gain unauthorized access, distribute harmful content, or interfere with technical systems is strictly prohibited.
strings.terms.pricing.title: Quotation and Pricing
strings.terms.pricing.body: All cost estimates and quotations are prepared on the basis of information available at the time of evaluation. Final pricing may be revised where project scope, material specifications, site conditions, policy requirements, or client instructions change during the implementation cycle.
strings.terms.documents.title: Document Handling
strings.terms.documents.body: Documents and personal records submitted for service processing are handled in accordance with our Privacy Notice. Such documents are used only for project eligibility checks, execution planning, compliance obligations, official processing, and legitimate service communication.
strings.terms.documents.point1: Documents are used only for authorized service activities
strings.terms.documents.point2: Access is restricted to relevant operational personnel
strings.terms.documents.point3: Retention follows legal and compliance obligations
strings.terms.liability.title: Limitation of Liability
strings.terms.liability.body: We make reasonable efforts to deliver services professionally and within planned timelines; however, delays or changes may occur due to external dependencies including utility approvals, third-party supplier schedules, regulatory revisions, weather conditions, force majeure events, and other factors outside direct operational control.
strings.terms.updates.title: Policy Updates
strings.terms.updates.body: We may revise these Terms of Service at any time to reflect legal requirements, operational updates, or regulatory changes. Updated versions become effective upon publication. Continued use of our website or services after publication indicates acceptance of the revised terms.
strings.terms.contact.title: Contact Information
strings.terms.lastUpdated.title: Last Updated
strings.privacy.title: Privacy Notice
strings.privacy.subtitle: Protecting your data with trust and responsibility
strings.privacy.intro: We handle personal and document data only for solar service processing. Our approach is simple: collect what is necessary, protect it with strong controls, and use it responsibly for customer service, project execution, and compliance.
strings.privacy.collect.title: Information We Collect
strings.privacy.collect.identity.title: Identity Documents
strings.privacy.collect.identity.body: Aadhar Card and PAN Card for customer identity validation.
strings.privacy.collect.financial.title: Financial Information
strings.privacy.collect.financial.body: Bank Passbook details for payment, subsidy, and financial process support.
strings.privacy.collect.utility.title: Utility Documents
strings.privacy.collect.utility.body: Electricity Bill records for load analysis and service planning.
strings.privacy.collect.location.title: Location Data
strings.privacy.collect.location.body: GPS photos of the installation area for feasibility checks and planning.
strings.privacy.collect.contact.title: Contact Information
strings.privacy.collect.contact.body: Contact number and email ID for service updates and customer communication.
strings.privacy.purpose.title: Purpose of Data Collection
strings.privacy.purpose.body: We collect data only to process solar services in a reliable, compliant, and transparent way. This helps our teams verify customer information, prepare accurate technical plans, and complete project execution and documentation without delay.
strings.privacy.purpose.point1: Identity and eligibility checks for service processing
strings.privacy.purpose.imageAlt: Data collection for solar service processing
strings.privacy.security.title: Data Security
strings.privacy.security.lead: Your records are protected with strict internal controls and secure handling standards.
strings.privacy.security.storage.title: Secure Storage
strings.privacy.security.storage.body: Data is stored in controlled systems with defined protection layers.
strings.privacy.security.access.title: Limited Access
strings.privacy.security.access.body: Only authorized personnel can access documents required for processing.
strings.privacy.security.misuse.title: Misuse Prevention
strings.privacy.security.misuse.body: Operational controls reduce risk of unauthorized use, loss, or exposure.
strings.privacy.sharing.title: Data Sharing
strings.privacy.sharing.notSold.title: Not Sold to Third Parties
strings.privacy.sharing.notSold.body: We do not sell personal data for commercial marketing or external advertising.
strings.privacy.sharing.limited.title: Limited Sharing Only
strings.privacy.sharing.limited.body: Sharing is restricted to required entities for service execution and approvals.
strings.privacy.sharing.compliance.title: Service and Legal Compliance
strings.privacy.sharing.compliance.body: Data is shared only when required for project processing or regulatory obligations.
strings.privacy.rights.title: User Rights
strings.privacy.rights.access.title: Access Data
strings.privacy.rights.access.body: You can request details of personal information submitted to us.
strings.privacy.rights.correction.title: Request Correction
strings.privacy.rights.correction.body: You can ask us to correct inaccurate or incomplete records.
strings.privacy.rights.deletion.title: Request Deletion
strings.privacy.rights.deletion.body: You can request deletion where legally permitted and operationally possible.
strings.privacy.cta.title: Have questions about your data?
strings.privacy.cta.body: Our team is available to support your privacy-related questions and service clarifications.
